facebook.caption:
5.0 stars. 530 reviews. Not a single one below perfect.

Into The Blue on 100 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is doing something right. Snorkeling boat trips off Phu Quoc with a rating that basically never happens at this scale. Clear water, coral, fish. No resort markup, no crowds bussed in from five hotels.

If you're spending even one day on this island, this is the day trip that earns its spot. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 530 people gave this 5 stars. Watch what they kept coming back for. Into The Blue snorkeling boat trips off Phu Quoc, and the water does the talking. Find them at 100 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.
